_comment: AUTHORITATIVE checkout catalog. Browser values are display-only. The current amount is an unconfirmed estimate: sandbox checkout is allowed for integration testing, but live checkout is explicitly forbidden. A human must confirm price, stock, tax, shipping, refund, and fulfillment policy before changing priceStatus to confirmed and checkout.live to true.
